description: New construction of wood & steel-framed 3-story mixed-use building consisting of a commercial restaurant/performance kitchen space in the ground floor w/ bathroom and dining/teaching spaces. Above there will be 2 stories of residential apartment units (1 apartment per floor) connected via an Exit Access Stair and Elevator. The mechanical equipment will be present in the roof, adjacent to a small rooftop patio space. There will be a pool, fire pit and exterior showers in the backyard area, surrounded by permeable driveway and parking spaces with Electric Vehicle charging stations. Accessory structures for storage and garbage cans will be adjacent to the parking area.
